testcase.name: @stynx-web/angular-trash > loads trash items and restores them through the adapter
@stynx-web/angular-trash > handles pagination, cascade restore, hard delete, and fallback errors
@stynx-web/angular-trash > ships a default SDK adapter provider and multiplexes configured kinds
@stynx-web/angular-trash > supports provider-backed components, tabs, filters, bulk actions, and retention countdowns
